title: Stakeholder Task, Workflow Fit, Authority, Risk, and Evidence · Retrieval Circuit
summary: A delayed engineering review reconstructs stakeholder task, workflow fit, authority, risk, and evidence from stakeholder, revision, runtime, model, interaction, call, result, state, approval, evaluation, trace, failure, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for bounded agent product and risk charter after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define stakeholder, user population, decision, task distribution, observable value, failure, review cadence, and non-goals before choosing a model.
Compare deterministic code, workflow, model-assisted step, and agent loop and choose the least variable architecture that satisfies the task.
Classify impact, reversibility, affected groups, uncertainty, data sensitivity, action authority, and required human oversight.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Separate evidence from confidence · Review Nongoals Escalation
steps.instruction:
review case — A review agent engineering team handles case 5058 during a privacy-minimized nonprofit workflow. Build deterministic Python evidence to gate agent construction on stakeholder value, workflow fit, authority, measurable failure, risk controls, and escalation; loops, concurrency, tokens, time, retries, and spend stay below explicit budgets; then replace trusted context with untrusted indirect instructions and preserve data-versus-instruction boundaries. Browser code uses pure bounded state machines and original fixed fixtures only. Real provider APIs, Gemini models, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic native validation, HTTP, files, credentials, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, privacy review, and production effects require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Define prohibited tasks, uncertainty disclosures, stop conditions, escalation owners, support paths, and authority revocation.
